# remnawave_hwid_top_users (Data Source)

Returns top users by HWID device count from the Remnawave panel.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `response` (String) Raw JSON response from the panel's HWID top-users endpoint.
